title: Cloud Infrastructure Migration Strategy
subtitle: A comprehensive blueprint for scaling DataSphere operations.

sections.heading: Executive Summary
paragraphs: DataSphere Systems is currently experiencing growing pains with its on-premise infrastructure, leading to increased latency during peak hours and higher maintenance costs. This proposal outlines a strategic migration to a cloud-native AWS architecture designed to improve scalability, enhance security, and reduce operational overhead by an estimated 35%.
Our team will execute a phased migration over a 12-week period, ensuring zero downtime for critical user-facing applications.

sections.heading: Proposed Solution
paragraphs: We propose a three-phase approach to modernizing your infrastructure:
bullets: Phase 1: Architecture audit and AWS landing zone setup.
Phase 2: Containerization of legacy monoliths using Docker and Kubernetes.
Phase 3: Database migration to Amazon Aurora with read-replica scaling.

pricing.description: Comprehensive review of current systems and detailed AWS architecture design.
Containerization, infrastructure as code (Terraform), and database migration.
24/7 monitoring, performance tuning, and team training.
